scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @mesa/web && npm run build -w @mesa/ops
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mesa/web && npm run lint -w @mesa/ops
scripts.test:unit: cd apps/web && node --import tsx --test src/lib/resolve-append-cart-items.test.ts src/lib/checkout-confirm-payment.test.ts src/lib/table-session-close-guards.test.ts src/lib/close-table-session-ui.test.ts src/lib/bill-split-by-item.test.ts src/lib/order-receipt-enqueue.test.ts
